/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/car.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/customer.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/data_io.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/employee.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/sale.c.o CMakeFiles/auto_sales.dir/src/utils.c.o -o auto_sales
